_schema: Sections 2-6 of the site hydrate from this file. The hero (name, title, value prop, contact) is static in index.html; update both when identity fields change. Section headlines are also static in index.html, not hydrated from here, so there is one source of truth to edit. Bump contentVersion in index.html (data-content-version) whenever this file changes so the CDN cache busts.

items: Flaky test triage and root cause analysis

responsibilities: Building a Playwright-TypeScript automation framework from scratch, covering UI and API test scenarios for core insurance products
Applying AI-assisted test case generation to accelerate coverage for new product features while keeping every generated case traceable to an acceptance criterion

experience.company: CCIS IT Bridging Program and SAIT
experience.metric: Two IT programs, back to back
responsibilities: Completed the CCIS IT Bridging Program employment skills training (Feb - Apr 2026)

Completed the SAIT Information Technology Fundamentals Certificate (Apr - May 2026): IT business analysis, project management, data concepts, digital solutioning, Python programming and data analytics, Agile project management

experience.metric: Zero Sev-1 production defects across monthly releases
responsibilities: Designed and executed 1,000+ manual and automated test cases against user stories and acceptance criteria, raising pre-release defect detection by roughly 30% through Selenium and Cucumber regression suites and cutting regression cycle time by about half

Led full testing effort as the sole QA in an Agile squad on a Tomcat-based web service front end, delivering stable monthly releases with zero Sev-1 production defects; critical defects caught pre-release in underwriting workflows were estimated by business operations to have avoided millions annually in underwriter rework

Wrote complex MS-SQL queries (CTEs, multi-table joins) to validate backend data accuracy and business rule compliance across policy rating engines and legacy AS400-integrated services, supporting reconciliation checks and defect root cause investigation

Performed REST API validation in Postman with scenario-based verification, payload validation, and response time analysis, sustaining about 99% integration reliability across interconnected enterprise applications
Integrated automated regression and smoke suites into Jenkins CI pipelines with pre-deployment quality gates, reducing production rollback incidents
Led initial test planning for legacy application server migrations from Windows Server 2016 to 2022, including validation of pre-production SQL Server database migrations

experience.clients: Suncor Energy, Rise Health, Frank Mortgage
responsibilities: Performed functional, integration, and API testing across enterprise web and cross-platform mobile applications, catching 80% of defects before UAT across client build cycles
Validated UI, API, and backend SQL data flows end to end for AI-enabled applications hosted on Microsoft Azure, including a mortgage broker platform with an AI chat interface
Managed the defect lifecycle in Jira and ServiceNow across onshore and offshore teams: logging, triage, retesting, impact analysis, and release validation
Automated mobile test execution with Testim.io and BrowserStack cloud devices, introduced Android simulators across OS versions, and maintained JMeter and LoadRunner performance scripts
Coordinated UAT cycles and release sign-offs, communicating testing risks and release blockers to product owners and business stakeholders

experience.clients: Baxter Healthcare, Roche Diagnostics, Mentor Worldwide
experience.metric: Safety-critical devices under FDA design controls
responsibilities: Executed verification, validation, and traceability activities for safety-critical medical devices in compliance with ISO quality standards and regulated QMS frameworks
Designed test protocols and executed validation cycles under FDA design control requirements, with reliability focus, risk assessment, and failure analysis
Built requirement traceability matrices and supported CAPA investigation documentation, collaborating with software, hardware, and QA teams on continuous quality improvement
Performed design verification testing for electromechanical medical devices through a structured V&V lifecycle in a regulated manufacturing environment
Documented defect investigations and traceability reports linking requirements to validation outcomes, ensuring compliance with FDA and ISO standards through the product development lifecycle

projects.name: selenium-cucumber-framework
projects.outcome: Cross-browser E2E suite with a live, public test report
projects.description: Java + Selenium 4 + Cucumber 7 BDD framework for an e-commerce demo app: Page Object Model, parallel cross-browser runs (Chrome, Firefox, Edge), Allure and Extent reporting, screenshot capture on failure, GitHub Actions and Jenkins pipelines.
projects.technologies: Java, Selenium, Cucumber, TestNG, Maven, Allure

projects.name: playwright-python-mcp
projects.outcome: Browser automation driven through the Playwright MCP server
projects.description: Python client that drives browser automation by talking to the official Playwright MCP server over stdio. Smoke tests against TodoMVC, unit tests plus optional live integration tests, GitHub Actions CI.

projects.name: ui-automation-parabank
projects.outcome: Banking demo UI suite with CI artifacts
projects.description: Playwright for Java + TestNG automation for the ParaBank banking app: login flows, form validation, headless smoke tests, Extent and Surefire reporting, GitHub Actions CI with artifact uploads.

projects.name: docker-qa-demo
projects.description: Alpine-based Docker image demonstrating a full container lifecycle for QA tooling: build, tag, publish to GHCR, with OCI metadata labels and a container health validation script.

caseStudy.title: How this site is tested
caseStudy.intro: I test this page the way I test the products I work on: name what could go wrong, then make sure it cannot fail quietly.

rows.risk: The content could quietly drift from my real resume
rows.control: Every section is checked against the source data automatically, on every change

rows.risk: Navigation could break in a browser I never tested by hand
rows.control: The full suite runs automatically in Chrome, Firefox, and Safari

rows.risk: Accessibility issues could slip through unnoticed
rows.control: Automated accessibility scans and a full keyboard-only walkthrough run on every change

rows.risk: Links go stale, or the downloadable resume falls out of sync
rows.control: Broken links are caught on a schedule, and the PDF is generated from this same page so it can not drift

education.degree: Master of Science in Materials Science
Bachelor of Technology in Metallurgical & Materials Engineering
